title: SICCA scRNAseq dataset
author: Taylor, Kimberly
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contain scRNAseq expression data for the SICCA cohort, as decribed in preprint “ Single-cell RNA sequencing of peripheral blood defines two immunological subtypes of Sjögren’s disease”     ( https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.02.27.640483v1 ).
steps_raw: This dataset contain scRNAseq expression data for the SICCA cohort, as decribed in preprint “ Single-cell RNA sequencing of peripheral blood defines two immunological subtypes of Sjögren’s disease”     ( https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.02.27.640483v1 ).
